endpoints.name: Get all the IoT hubs in a subscription.
endpoints.description: Get all the IoT hubs in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Check if an IoT hub name is available.
endpoints.description: Check if an IoT hub name is available.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Get all the IoT hubs in a resource group.
endpoints.description: Get all the IoT hubs in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get the non-security related metadata of an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Get the non-security related metadata of an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Create or update the metadata of an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Create or update the metadata of an Iot hub. The usual pattern to modify a property is to retrieve the IoT hub metadata and security metadata, and then combine them with the modified values in a new body to update the IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Delete an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get a shared access policy by name from an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-security.
endpoints.description: Get a shared access policy by name from an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-security.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{KEYNAME}} with a real keyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get the statistics from an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Get the statistics from an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get a list of the consumer groups in the Event Hub-compatible device-to-cloud endpoint in an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Get a list of the consumer groups in the Event Hub-compatible device-to-cloud endpoint in an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EVENTHUBENDPOINTNAME}} with a real eventhubendpointname.

endpoints.name: Get a consumer group from the Event Hub-compatible device-to-cloud endpoint for an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Get a consumer group from the Event Hub-compatible device-to-cloud endpoint for an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EVENTHUBENDPOINTNAME}} with a real eventhubendpointname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Add a consumer group to an Event Hub-compatible endpoint in an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Add a consumer group to an Event Hub-compatible endpoint in an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EVENTHUBENDPOINTNAME}} with a real eventhubendpointname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Delete a consumer group from an Event Hub-compatible endpoint in an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Delete a consumer group from an Event Hub-compatible endpoint in an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EVENTHUBENDPOINTNAME}} with a real eventhubendpointname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Exports all the device identities in the IoT hub identity registry to an Azure Storage blob container. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry#import-and-export-device-identities.
endpoints.description: Exports all the device identities in the IoT hub identity registry to an Azure Storage blob container. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry#import-and-export-device-identities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Import, update, or delete device identities in the IoT hub identity registry from a blob. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry#import-and-export-device-identities.
endpoints.description: Import, update, or delete device identities in the IoT hub identity registry from a blob. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry#import-and-export-device-identities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get a list of all the jobs in an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry.
endpoints.description: Get a list of all the jobs in an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get the details of a job from an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry.
endpoints.description: Get the details of a job from an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-identity-registry.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get the security metadata for an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-security.
endpoints.description: Get the security metadata for an IoT hub. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/iot-hub/iot-hub-devguide-security.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get the quota metrics for an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Get the quota metrics for an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get the list of valid SKUs for an IoT hub.
endpoints.description: Get the list of valid SKUs for an IoT hub.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
